name: @soltrade/execution-wallet-pool
description: Execution Wallet Pool view + Assignment Policy (Gate D / D0): selection only over the C0 registry. Deterministic, in-memory. Supports all wallet_assignment_policy values; selects only ACTIVE-eligible wallets; Hard Risk is global aggregate (mock input) with no bypass via multiplicity. No asset transfer; no rotation; no sweep; no transfer-boundary; no signing/sending; no KeyManager; no key material; no RPC; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority.
